text: Public Debt: FY2024. Total Government Debt: ₹170.06 lakh crore (56.8% of GDP). External Debt: $663.8 billion. Internal Debt: 93% of total. Market Borrowings: ₹15.43 lakh crore. Debt servicing: 20% of revenue.
Public Debt: FY2023. Total Government Debt: ₹155 lakh crore (57.1% of GDP). External Debt: $629.1 billion. Debt-to-GDP ratio stable. FRBM target: 40% central government debt by FY2027.
Public Debt: FY2022. Total Government Debt: ₹147 lakh crore (59.2% of GDP). Elevated due to COVID borrowing. External Debt: $617 billion. Forex reserves: $607 billion. Import cover: 11 months.
Public Debt: FY2025 (Estimated). Total: ₹185 lakh crore (56% of GDP). Fiscal consolidation path. Target fiscal deficit: 4.9%. Market borrowing: ₹14.01 lakh crore. Debt sustainability improving.
Public Debt: FY2021. Total: ₹140 lakh crore (61.5% of GDP). Pandemic peak. Fiscal deficit: 9.2% of GDP. Emergency borrowing for COVID relief. ₹20 lakh crore Atmanirbhar Bharat package impact.
